text:
Prediction: No

Reasoning:
The current visit record primarily details diagnoses and management related to severe cardiovascular conditions (Rheumatic heart failure, Atrial fibrillation, End stage renal disease, etc.) and associated complications (Hypertensive chronic kidney disease, Pressure ulcer, etc.). There is no explicit mention of lipid abnormalities, hypercholesterolemia, or hyperlipidemia in the provided diagnoses or management plan. The medications prescribed (Nitroglycerin, Furosemide, Captopril, Warfarin, etc.) are directed towards managing these cardiovascular and renal issues, not specifically managing a lipid disorder. Therefore, based strictly on the evidence provided, there is no strong and explicit basis to predict that a diagnosis of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be coded in the next hospital visit.
